nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Northeast wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain between 8am and 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 46. East wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before 11pm, then a chance of rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 46, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. South wind 7 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 53. Southwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.
